_fixture_meta.source: DOCS-DERIVED — official Paddle Billing adjustment.created payload shape (developer.paddle.com), per the 8-field docs pass. NOT a real captured payload.
_fixture_meta.reconcile: Reconcile byte-for-byte against a REAL captured payload during live verification (see ./README.md two-layer plan). OPEN QUESTIONS for Layer 2: (1) the data.action enum in practice — confirm refund/chargeback vs the *_reverse/credit/credit_reverse undo actions (Correction C allowlist); (2) the status lifecycle — does adjustment.created ever arrive already 'approved', or always 'pending' first then adjustment.updated -> 'approved' (Correction B)?; (3) the transaction_id path (data.transaction_id) and that adjustments carry NO custom_data.user_id (Correction 8a); (4) totals are STRINGS.
